title: Sabina Pedrazzini
text:
Sabina Pedrazzini
I’m a PhD candidate at the Centre for Development and Environment of the University of Bern (Switzerland). My research focuses on the determinants of collective action in urban commons initiatives, and on its consequences for individual psychological well-being.
